eligibility.step1: What type of loan do you need?

fields.documentsHint: Upload credit report, bank statements, or salary slips to speed up approval.

consents.communication: I hereby authorize Click India Capital and its lending partners to contact me via phone, SMS, WhatsApp, email, or other communication channels regarding loan products and related services. I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions.
consents.documents: I voluntarily authorize Click India Capital to review and analyze my uploaded credit report, bank statements, and financial documents solely for eligibility assessment, lender matching, and loan facilitation purposes.
